description: A live broadcast still labeled 'House Chamber' showing two women seated in the gallery; one wears a headband and raises a hand near her face, the other wears glasses and a light blazer with a patterned scarf. Both have 'RELEASE THE FILES' badges. A man sits in front of them with eyes closed. A chyron reads 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP Delivers State of the Union Address' with 'REAL AMERICA'S VOICE' branding.
notable_text: House Chamber; RELEASE THE FILES; PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP Delivers State of the Union Address
